title: .NET Utvecklare
description:
We now have a new requirement and are looking for a consultant colleague with the qualifications listed below. The position is part of our consulting business, which means you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments.

*As part of your application, you may be presented to clients/partners as part of the recruitment process. If selected for the assignment, you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments as part of our consulting business.*

 **Your Profile (Must-have requirements)**  

* Experience: 6+ years in backend development, with a focus on .NET technologies and database management.
* Skills: Proficiency in APIs, SQL databases, and a solid understanding of backend architecture. Full-stack experience is a plus.
* Team Player: Ability to work collaboratively and contribute to a positive team dynamic.
* Language: Fluency in Swedish is essential for effective communication and project execution.
* Flexibility: Comfortable switching between tasks in a fast-paced, small-team environment.

  

**Application deadline:** 24-03-2026 **About Us**  

We currently employ experienced consultants in areas such as System Development, AI, Machine Learning, Testing, Cloud, Infra DevOps, and IT Project Management.  

  

Working at Deploja is something entirely different from working at an ordinary consulting company—and we are really proud of that. So, what makes us unique?  

  

We simply offer more than just a high salary and greater freedom; that’s just the beginning. With us, you’ll find the work environment and opportunities you deserve. Welcome to Deploja, where the grass is indeed greener!

 **Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**


Exciting assignments with our many clients. We focus on long-term projects, which gives you the opportunity to create value for the client while also developing yourself.


A secure monthly salary – together we’ll agree on a base salary depending on your assignments.


Company car – we encourage you to choose an electric car for a more sustainable future.


Occupational pension and great opportunities for salary conversion.


Vacation – Would you like more than 30 days of vacation, perhaps 60 days?


Private health insurance, accident insurance, and life insurance for increased security.


Skills development – you set your own budget and choose the training you wish to attend.


Quality of life – Are you struggling to balance everyday life and wish to work a little less while still earning as much, if not more?

*We handle applications continuously, and due to the high workload, it's especially important to include a short motivation for the position, explaining how you meet the requirements.*

title: Senior Utvecklare med Kompetens inom Metadata och Data Governance
description:
**Beskrivning**


Syftet med uppdraget är att stärka vår kunds team i arbetet med den nya målarkitekturen för beslutsstöd och analys, med särskilt fokus på Data Governance och metadata. Uppdraget omfattar att etablera och vidareutveckla datakatalog och datakarta för att förbättra förståelsen, användningen och spårbarheten av data genom hela kedjan – från källa till användning.


Konsulten ska arbeta som senior specialist inom Data Governance och metadata, med bred teknisk kompetens. Rollen innebär att utveckla och kvalitetssäkra metadatahantering, säkerställa standardisering av data samt bidra till en robust och användarvänlig struktur för beslutsstödsarkitekturen.


Konsulten förväntas samarbeta nära teamet och andra parallella initiativ, stödja vid hög arbetsbelastning och säkerställa att verksamhetens behov av korrekt, tillgänglig och begriplig data uppfylls.

**Skallkrav**

* Minst 5 års dokumenterad erfarenhet av Metadatamanagement, inklusive Datakataloger, Business Glossary och Datakontrakt.
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet från minst tre uppdrag som utvecklare eller metadataspecialist inom plattformar eller verktyg för metadatahantering, såsom datakataloglösningar.
* Minst 5 års dokumenterad teknisk kompetens på utvecklarnivå inom datalagring och datahantering i Oracle.
* Minst 3 års dokumenterad erfarenhet som utvecklare i verktyg eller plattformar för dataflöden, inklusive ETL/ELT.
* Svenska i tal och skrift

**Börkrav**

* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av att utveckla dataprodukter som integrerar data, metadata och behörighetshantering för att skapa ett användarvänligt sätt att hitta och förstå tillgänglig information i en större beslutsstödsarkitektur
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av hur Data Management, Data Governance och Metadata Management samspelar inom ett datastyrningsprogram för beslutsstödsarkitektur
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av utveckling och kravställning mot BI-verktyg, gärna Qlik Sense
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av utveckling i Informatica
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av avancerat utvecklingsarbete i Excel

title: Optimizely utvecklare
description:
*Hos oss får du arbeta i ett tight team där du kombinerar teknik och konsultmässighet. Du är med hela vägen, från dialog och behovsanalys till implementation och vidareutveckling, och bidrar aktivt i samtal och rådger kring lösningar och prioriteringar som skapar verkligt värde för våra kunder. Rollen innebär att du arbetar både i teamleveranser och i expertuppdrag hos kund.*

**Om rollen**  

Vi söker en Optimizely utvecklare som kombinerar teknisk bredd med stark konsultmässighet. Du är trygg i din leverans och drivs av att skapa affärsvärde genom dialog, struktur och rådgivning.
  

  

I rollen ansvarar du för utveckling genom hela stacken och bidrar samtidigt aktivt i dialog kring lösningar, prioriteringar och vägval med kund. Du kommer även att:

* Säkerställa kvalitet, struktur och framdrift i hela leveransen.
* Bidra i tidiga kunddialoger och formar lösningsförslag tillsammans med kund och kollegor.
* Översätta verksamhetsbehov till skalbara och hållbara lösningar.
* Utveckla den långsiktiga relationen och affären tillsammans med våra kunder.
 **Din profil**  

Tekniken är ditt verktyg men din styrka ligger i att förstå helheten och skapa värde i varje del av leveransen.

* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av fullstackutveckling.
* Erfarenhet av Optimizely/Episerver
* Van att arbeta i moderna tekniska miljöer.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i projekt där AI, tillgänglighet, hållbarhet eller säkerhet varit centralt i digitala lösningar.
* Trygg i kunddialog och konsultrollen.
* Förstår kopplingen mellan teknik, affär och verksamhetsbehov.
**Meriterande är det om du har:**  



* Erfarenhet av .NET/C#, JavaScript/TypeScript och React.
* Kunskap om moderna webb- och e-handelsplattformar samt systemintegrationer.
**Vad vi erbjuder:**  



* Tillgång till ett inspirerande nätverk med närmare 350 kollegor inom Experience.
* En trygg anställning med kollektivavtal, generösa och proaktiva hälso- och friskvårdsupplägg samt pensions- och försäkringsförmåner.
* En miljö som främjar och värdesätter initiativ och kompetensutveckling.
* En arbetsplats som värdesätter balans mellan arbete och fritid samt aktivt arbetar med jämställdhet, miljö och hållbarhet.
**Ansökan**  

Låter detta som du? Då vill vi gärna höra från dig! Har du frågor om rollen eller om oss på Knowit? Tveka inte att kontakta Sandra Skilberg eller Caroline Almqvist.  

  



Vi ser fram emot att träffa dig!

title: Mjukvaruutvecklare - Android – inom Automotive
description:
Vi söker nu en mjukvaruutvecklare inom Android som vill arbeta med moderna tekniker och vara med och skapa smarta, framtidssäkra lösningar hos kund inom automotive.


I rollen som mjukvaruutvecklare arbetar du med Android-applikationer och systemnivåutveckling för fordonsapplikationer, där du får möjlighet att utveckla innovativa lösningar.


Som mjukvaruutvecklare inom Android och Automotive blir du en del av ett engagerat team där ni tillsammans arbetar med hela utvecklingsprocessen, från kravinsamling och design till implementering, test, driftsättning och vidareutveckling.

**Vi söker mjukvaruutvecklare inom Android oss har:**

* En civilingenjörs- eller högskoleingenjörsexamen inom elektronik, mjukvaruutveckling eller motsvarande
* Minst 2 eller fler års erfarenhet som mjukvaruutvecklare och flera års erfarenhet av Android apputveckling, Android systemutveckling samt Android testverktygen: Junit, Espresso och Mockito
* Erfarenhet av Continuous Integration och goda kunskaper i Java, Kotlin och Android Studio
* Djup kunskap inom AOSP (Android Open Source Project**)** och dess byggsystem
* Erfarenhet av moderna arkitekturmönster, såsom: MVP, MVVM, Lagerbaserad arkitektur och refaktorering
* Förmåga att kommunicera på både svenska och engelska i tal och skrift

**Meriterande**

* Erfarenhet av utveckling inom Android Automotive
* Erfarenhet av infotainmentsystem inom fordonsindustrin (t.ex. inställningsappar eller liknande)
* Erfarenhet från fordonsindustrin är meriterande
* B-körkort är meriterande.


Vi söker mjukvaruutvecklare inom Android som är nyfiken, lösningsorienterad och trivs i team där samarbete är nyckeln till framgång. Förmågan att hantera flera parallella uppgifter samtidigt och arbetar strukturerat även i ett högt tempo. Vi tror att du är e driven utvecklare, kvalitetsmedveten och motiveras såklart av tekniska utmaningar.


Syntronic erbjuder en trygg anställning i en dynamisk och framåtriktad miljö. Att vi är ett team är vår styrka, därför ser vi att du arbetar tillsammans på plats med oss på kontoret – när du inte behövs hos någon av våra kunder förstås!

**Vi erbjuder**


På Syntronic blir du en del av en härlig gemenskap där din röst hörs och dina idéer välkomnas. Vi erbjuder flexibla arbetstider, balans mellan arbete och fritid samt regelbundna karriärutvecklingssamtal och interna workshops för din utveckling. Utöver detta får du förmånliga förmåner och försäkringar. Hos oss får du inte bara ett jobb – du får en plats att växa och trivas både personligt och professionellt. Välkommen till Syntronic!

**Ansökan**


Vi ser fram emot din ansökan, som ska vara oss tillhanda senast 18 april. Vi arbetar med löpande urval och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag.


Bakgrundskontroller kan förekomma.


Av kommunikation- och kvalitetssäkringsskäl ber vi dig att skicka in din ansökan digitalt via vårt system och inte via e-post.

title: Business Developer – Medical & Industrial Isotopes
description:
Are you ready to drive growth in one of the world’s most advanced and impactful technology sectors? We are looking for a strategic and energetic **Business Developer** to accelerate our expansion within **medical and industrial radioisotopes**—an area critical to global healthcare, research, and high‑tech industry.

**About the Role**


As our Business Developer, you will take the lead in identifying market opportunities, building strong customer relationships, and developing new business streams. You will work closely with our technical, commercial, and operational teams to shape competitive offerings and secure long‑term partnerships within the radioisotope value chain.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Develop and implement commercial strategies for growth in medical and industrial isotope markets
* Identify and cultivate new customer relationships across pharma, nuclear medicine, research, and industrial sectors
* Drive sales cycles from prospecting to contract negotiation
* Analyze market trends, competitors, and regulatory developments
* Collaborate with internal stakeholders to tailor solutions, proposals, and value‑adding services
* Represent the company at conferences, customer visits, and industry events

**Requirements**

* Relevant technical university degree (e.g., Engineering, Physics, Chemistry, Nuclear Technology or similar)
* Proven experience in sales or business development within the radioisotope market (medical or industrial applications)
* Strong understanding of nuclear technology, isotope production, or radiopharmaceutical supply chains
* Demonstrated ability to build customer trust and close complex technical sales
* Excellent communication, negotiation, and stakeholder‑management skills
* Ability to work strategically while driving hands‑on commercial execution

**We Offer**

* A key commercial role in a fast‑growing and strategically important sector
* Opportunities to shape new business areas and influence product development
* A collaborative, innovative work environment with global reach
* Competitive compensation and benefits


If you’re motivated by developing business with real impact — from cancer treatment to cutting‑edge industrial applications, we want to hear from you.

**Apply today and help shape the future of isotope technology.**

**Please send in your application via our website** **www.studsvik.com****. The recruitment process is ongoing, so send in your application as soon as possible.**


If you want to know more about the position contact Sales manager Joakim Lundström, at +4676-002 11 53 or joakim.lundstrom@studsvik.com. If you want to know more about the recruitment process, contact HR-consultant Jenny Göransdotter +4676 002 19 17 or jenny.goransdotter@studsvik.com

**About Studsvik:**


Studsvik is a listed company on NASDAQ Stockholm, and we have over 500 employees in 6 countries. We have over 75 years of experience in nuclear technology and services in the radiological environment with customers worldwide. For more information about Studsvik - visit our website www.studsvik.com.

title: Power BI Developer
description:
We are looking for a **Power BI Developer** for a global manufacturing company in **Malmö.**

**Start is ASAP, 5 months limited contract to begin with, Possibility of extension after that.**


As a Power BI developer in the team you will design, build, and maintain automated, insight driven dashboards that consolidate performance data across all company franchisees, transforming today’s manual, fragmented reporting into a reliable and centralized analytics ecosystem. Your work will focus on connecting and modeling data from multiple sources to deliver a unified franchise performance evaluation framework that covers 26 criteria. You will need to ensure accuracy, data validation, version control, and auditability, enabling leadership and franchise management teams to access consistent, trustworthy metrics for trends analysis and continuous improvement.


In addition, you will create a scalable dashboard with intuitive visualizations, clear drill downs, and standardized metric definitions, strengthening data accessibility and reducing turnaround time for reporting and decision making. You will need to collaborate with multiple stakeholders in different parts of the company to refine KPIs, streamline automated data flows, and ensure alignment with the franchise feedback loop. Your deliverables will empower stakeholders with actionable insights that improve compliance, optimize performance management, and reduce manual effort across the evaluation process, contributing to a more scalable and insight driven franchise ecosystem.

**As a Power BI developer you will play a key role in developing CMP data foundation:**


We expect candidates to:

* Comfortable working in the early phases of solution design and contributing across the entire delivery lifecycle, including ideation, data modeling, requirements analysis, functional design, estimation, sprint planning, development, testing, documentation, deployment, and post‑release support.
* Strong understanding of Power BI architecture and best practices, including semantic models, DAX optimization, performance tuning, and report design standards.
* Experience adhering to governance, quality guidelines, release procedures, and documentation standards across BI solutions.
* Passionate about designing clean, scalable, and maintainable data models and reports, with a strong focus on reusability, performance, and collaborative development practices (e.g., version control and peer reviews).
* Skilled in gathering and translating business requirements into technical BI solutions, and comfortable facilitating discussions with stakeholders to clarify data needs, KPIs, and success criteria.
* Strong communication skills, with the ability to clearly explain data models, metrics, and insights to non‑technical stakeholders.

**You will work with:**

* Microsoft Power BI (Power BI Service, Power BI Desktop, DAX, Power Query)
* Microsoft Azure, including data sources and services commonly used with Power BI (e.g., Azure SQL, Data Lake)


This is a full-time consultant position in **Malmö** through Incluso. Start is **ASP, 5 months** limited contract to begin with, with possibility of extension after that.  

  

Please submit your CV as soon as possible since we will review the applications on an on-going basis.


For more information about this role, please contact **Kanika Singhal** recruiter at Incluso.

title: Real Time 3D Developer (Unreal / Unity)
description:
Ready for something different? Are you an experienced and passionate developer looking for the next challenge in your career? Piktiv is on a mission to help our clients leverage game technology even more than is being done today. We are looking for the right people to join our team and bring this vision to life. If you would like to combine the benefits of working as a consultant with the benefits of working in a product company, we at Piktiv would like to hear from you!

**Who We Are**
--------------


We are a progressive consultancy company that provides smart solutions for our clients. Our work spans from heavy industry systems, healthcare applications, retail and fintech systems, to computer games. We pride ourselves on our commitment to excellence and our ability to turn complex challenges into streamlined solutions.


What sets us apart is that Piktiv brings in client projects to work on in-house by providing highly skilled fullstack teams instead of individual consultants. We are currently looking to expand our team with developers who have experience working with modern game engines to help us deliver solutions for our clients across multiple industries.

**Who You Are**
---------------


You have several years of experience in software development and a strong background working with modern game engines such as Unreal Engine or Unity. You enjoy solving complex problems and building robust systems.


You are both technically strong and pragmatic in how you approach solutions. You are comfortable taking ownership of technical decisions and leading development efforts when needed.


You communicate clearly with both technical and non‑technical stakeholders and enjoy collaborating with multidisciplinary teams. Experience working with industrial companies is a strong plus.


You seek an engaging work environment that allows you to work with challenging technical problems, a high degree of personal freedom and responsibility.

**What You Will Do**
--------------------


As part of our team, you will work on projects that leverage game engines to solve complex challenges for our clients.


Responsibilities include:

* Designing and developing applications using game engines such as Unreal Engine or Unity
* Building real‑time 3D applications such as simulations, visualization tools, digital twins, and other interactive systems
* Collaborating with designers, engineers, and client stakeholders to deliver high‑quality solutions
* Taking a leading role in projects where game technology is a core component
* Contributing to architectural decisions and ensuring scalable, maintainable implementations
* Helping drive projects forward from concept through delivery

**Qualifications**
------------------

* Several years of professional software development experience
* Strong experience with Unreal Engine or Unity
* Professional proficiency in English

**Desirable Skills**
--------------------

* Experience building simulation systems, digital twins, or visualization tools
* Experience working within manufacturing or automotive industries.

**What We Offer**
-----------------


At Piktiv, we believe in the importance of open communication and creating a collaborative workplace where each individual can thrive. We work hard to cultivate a culture of support and learning with an emphasis on a healthy work-life balance. We offer a competitive salary as well as several perks and benefits. Rather than offer a standardized plan across the company, we like to tailor our offer to your personal preferences in person. The position is full-time, 40 hours per week.

title: Corporate Developer – TV4 Media
description:
Are you strategic and analytical with a passion for driving change and turning complex challenges into action? Do you thrive at the intersection of strategy, project management and hands‑on execution? If so, **TV4 and MTV — Sweden’s and Finland’s leading commercial broadcasters — are looking for a Corporate Developer to join our team.**


This is your opportunity to play a vital role in how we drive transformation, improve our processes and steer key initiatives across TV4 Media. You’ll combine analytical thinking, project management, and practical analysis and problem‑solving skills to deliver insights, structure and momentum in a fast‑moving media landscape. Here, your work will challenge the status quo, support strategic decisions, and help shape the future of our business.

**About the Role**


As a Corporate Developer, you will take on a broad and varied role, working closely with both management and key functions across TV4, MTV and Schibsted. The assignments vary in both scope and character – from long‑term strategic initiatives to hands‑on operational tasks. You will work across multiple levels and departments, shifting between large and small initiatives, high‑level analysis and practical execution.

**Examples of assignments:**

* Project managing integration and synergy initiatives together with Schibsted
* Analyzing and reporting TV4 Media’s CO₂ emissions and support developing our sustainability strategy
* Support in strategy and business planning processes
* Producing strategic analyses, business cases, and decision material
* Coordinating TV/Media’s overall risk management

**Who You Are**


We believe you have a few years of experience as a Corporate Developer, Management Consultant, or Project Manager. You are:

* Highly analytical and structured, with a strategic mindset and a business-oriented attitude
* Confident in leading projects and creating clarity in complex topics
* Pragmatic, hands‑on, and unafraid of rolling up your sleeves
* Securing a holistic perspective, but you can also dive into details when needed
* Skilled in Excel and able to create clear, visually appealing PowerPoint presentations
* Comfortable shifting between different types of assignments – strategic, operational, large, and small, at different levels of the organization

**Why Join Us?**


At TV4/MTV, you’ll be part of a forward‑thinking Nordic finance and transformation environment operating across Sweden and Finland.

**This is an exciting time to join us:**

* We’re driving a digital transformation that is reshaping our industry
* We’ve recently been acquired by Schibsted, opening new opportunities for integration and collaboration


Join us if you want a role where your work creates real impact and helps move the organization forward.

**What You Will Get with Us**

* A central role in TV4 Media’s strategic and transformational initiatives
* A workday that blends project management, analysis, strategy, development, and change work
* An engaged team with short decision paths and significant opportunities to influence
* Close collaboration with Schibsted and many parts of TV4 Media


You will be part of a small and committed team of Corporate Developers and Business Controllers, reporting to Hanna Levander, Head of Group Reporting & Corporate Transformation.

**Ready to Take the Next Step?**


Apply now and become part of our journey to build a smarter, more data‑driven, and more transparent TV4 Media.

**Practical Information**

* **Employment:** Permanent position, with a six‑month probation period
* **Start date:** By agreement
* **Location:** Stockholm, Tegeluddsvägen — walking distance from Gärdet metro station
* **Onsite policy:** 4 days per week in the office
* **Facilities:** In‑house gym, parking garage, and restaurant

**Application deadline:** April 2nd 2026. Selection and interviews are ongoing — so we encourage you to apply as soon as possible.


For questions about the role, please contact:  

**Hanna Levander**  

Head of Group Reporting & Corporate Transformation  

hanna.levander@tv4.se


For union‑related questions (Unionen), please contact:  

unionen@tv4.se

**About TV4 Media**


TV4, together with MTV in Finland, is owned by Schibsted and forms TV4 Media – the largest commercial TV group in the Nordics. We reach millions of viewers every day with high‑quality news, entertainment, sports, and drama. With us, you’ll be part of a modern media company that combines creative energy with business‑driven development.

title: Front End Developer| Stockholm, Sweden
description:
**Role** 
 – Front End Developer
   

  

**Technology** 
 – React, JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML, SCSS, Responsive Design, Accessibility
   

  

**Location** 
 – Stockholm, Sweden
   

  

**Business Unit** 
 – CMTADM
   

  

**Compensation** 
 – Competitive (including bonus)
   

  

**Job Description**
 Today, the corporate landscape is dynamic and the world ahead is full of possibilities! None of the amazing things we do at Infosys would be possible without an equally amazing culture, the environment where ideas can flourish and where you are empowered to move forward as far as your ideas will take you.
   

  

 At Infosys, we assure that your career will never stand still, we will inspire you to build what’s next and we will navigate further together. Our journey of learnability, values and trusted relationships with our clients continue to be the cornerstones of our organization and these values are upheld only because of our people.
   

  

**Your role**
 In the role of Developer you will develop design of applications, provide regular support/guidance to project teams on complex coding, issue resolution and execution. You will collaborate with some of the best talent in the industry to create and implement innovative high-quality solutions. You will be part of a learning culture, where teamwork and collaboration are encouraged, excellence is rewarded, and diversity is respected and valued.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Responsible for all codes delivery.
* Use XP practices like TDD/Pair Programming.
* Delivery of application code, functional test automation code, unit test code, integration tests, and service virtualization.
* Build and maintain test programs.
* System implementation including, but not limited to, gathering requirements, system solution design.
* Performing development activities including hands-on development, reviews and providing technical guidance to team members
* Interfacing with technical and business stakeholders – internal and external
* Configuration, customization and integration of application.
* Client interfacing and offshore coordination.
* Available to be on-call and support production issues.


**Required**
* Strong hands on development experience with React, JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML, SCSS, Responsive Design, Accessibility
* SRE: Prometheus, Grafana, Jaeger, Open Telemetry, Monitoring, Tracing, Alerting
* IAM (Platform aligned): Azure Entra ID, Authentication, Authorization, RBAC, SSO
* Familiar with latest trends in industry from technology and domain standpoint
* Experience and good understanding of IT SDLC lifecycle phases. Good understanding Agile principles and practices
* Strong business process/system analytical skills
* Excellent oral and written communication skills with ability to interact with technical and functional staff at all levels.
* Experience and desire to work in a Global delivery environment.


**Preferred**
* Experience in telecommunication domain.


**Personal**
**Qualifications**
 Besides the professional qualifications, we respect and place equal importance to the candidate’s personality which facilitates success in customer environments. Few traits we look for are:
   

  

* High analytical skills
* A high degree of initiative, flexibility and adaptability
* High customer orientation
* Quality awareness
* Good verbal and written communication skills
* Creative, innovative and able to work in a fast-paced environment
* Team Player


**About Infosys**
 Infosys is a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting. We enable clients in over 50 countries to navigate their digital transformation. With over three decades of experience in managing the systems and workings of global enterprises, we expertly steer our clients through the many next of their digital journey. We do it by enabling the enterprise with an AI-powered core that helps prioritize the execution of change. We also empower the business with agile digital at scale to deliver unprecedented levels of performance and customer delight. Our always-on learning agenda drives their continuous improvement through building and transferring digital skills, expertise and ideas from our innovation ecosystem.
   

  

 Visit www.infosys.com to see how Infosys can help your enterprise navigate your next.
   

  

**All aspects of employment at Infosys are based on merit, competence and performance. We are committed to embracing diversity and creating an inclusive environment for all employees. Infosys is proud to be an equal opportunity employer**

title: Fullstack Developer
description:
**Do you want to build B2C solutions that are used at scale – and actually matter to end users?**
 As a Fullstack Developer at GlobalConnect, you will be part of a team that owns the full B2C portal experience, from frontend to backend.
   

  

 If you enjoy variety, responsibility, and building solutions that are continuously evolving, this is a role where you can really make your mark. The role combines new development, integrations, and continuous improvement in a high-impact B2C environment. You will work across the entire value chain. Close collaboration with stakeholders, users, and business teams is a natural part of your day, and you combine technical insight with a strong sense of ownership. You will work in an agile setup, collaborating daily with other developers, product owners, and you take responsibility for both delivery and quality.
   

  

**Your Responsibilities**
* Develop and maintain B2C portals using modern frontend and backend technologies
* Work end-to-end with both frontend and backend development
* Build customer-specific portal solutions on top of a shared platform base
* Design and implement REST APIs and integrations with third-party systems
* Collaborate closely with business stakeholders and users to shape solutions
* Contribute actively in agile ceremonies and continuous delivery


**What You Need To Succeed**
* Strong experience in modern Spring Boot microservice development (Java, preferably Java 21)
* Solid experience designing and working with REST APIs
* Experience with Angular 20 for frontend development
* Experience working with Git and agile methodologies (Scrum)


 Beyond the technical skills, you are comfortable working in a stakeholder-heavy environment and enjoy being part of discussions that span both technology and business. Experience with designing and developing accessible digital solutions with a clear understanding of WCAG compliance is a plus, but not required.
   

  

**The team & collaboration**
 You will join a fullstack team with mixed seniority and strong collaboration. The team is distributed across several locations and works closely together using agile ways of working. Daily standups, close collaboration, and a strong sense of ownership are key parts of the team culture.
   

  

**Why join this role**
 This is a role for someone who wants to work broadly as a fullstack developer and take real ownership of complete solutions. You will be part of a long-term journey, continuously developing new functionality and delivering value at scale in a high-impact B2C context.
   

  

**About Us**
 GlobalConnect is one of the leading connectivity providers in Northern Europe. We’re 2000 passionate and talented individuals who want to make a difference, turning our customers’ visions into reality through connectivity. Our goal is to create the best possible conditions for engaged employees, a place where you can develop and grow, and create unforgettable memories and enjoyable experiences.
   

  

 We have helped develop and digitize societies across the Nordics for more than two decades. Our purpose is what drives us to continue - turning visions into reality by empowering society with connectivity.

title: Full Stack Developer
description:
Full Stack Developer (Angular / Java - Spring Boot)
 



 Employment Type: Contract, 3 month Rolling
 



 Location: Stockholm, Sweden – Hybrid (2 days per week on-site)
 



 Role Overview
 



 We are seeking an experienced Full Stack Developer to design, develop, and maintain scalable web applications using modern front-end and back-end technologies. You will work across the full development lifecycle, delivering high-quality solutions in a collaborative, agile environment.
 



  





 Key Responsibilities
 


* Develop and maintain front-end applications using Angular.
* Build and enhance backend services using Java and Spring Boot.
* Design and implement RESTful APIs and microservices.
* Collaborate with product owners, designers, and engineers to define and deliver features.
* Write clean, maintainable, and testable code following best practices.
* Participate in code reviews, testing, and CI/CD processes.
* Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues across the stack.
* Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions.



  





 Technical Stack
 



 Angular, TypeScript, Java, Spring Boot, REST APIs, Microservices Architecture, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SQL/NoSQL databases, Git, CI/CD pipelines, Docker (desirable), cloud platforms (AWS/Azure – desirable).
 



  





 Requirements
 


* Proven experience as a Full Stack Developer using Angular and Java Spring Boot.
* Strong understanding of frontend and backend development principles.
* Experience building and consuming REST APIs.
* Familiarity with Agile development methodologies.
* Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work in a collaborative environment.
* Angular Experience, Version 18 Onwards

title: Gameplay Programmer
description:
**Why choose Coody** 
 At Coody, we cut out everything unnecessary to give more back to you as a consultant. And we have done it in the package of a lean and efficient organization, meaning no overpaid managers, no fancy offices and no extravagant conferences. Instead we give you:
   

  

**Maximized Compensation.** 
 Typically a +40% salary increase.
   

  

**Freedom & Flexibility.** 
 No bosses. All digital. Fully remote for those who prefer.
   

  

**Employment Security.** 
 High salary, pension, insurance, paid vacation and a big educational fund.
   

  

**Shape the Future.** 
 Projects and assignments for digital game changers like Spotify, Mojang, Toca Boca, and other leading studios and tech companies building the next generation of interactive experiences.
   

  

 As we are growing, we are continuously hiring senior tech consultants and connecting them with impactful projects through our client network.
   

  

**What you’ll be doing** 
 As a
 **Senior Gameplay Programmer** 
 at Coody, you’ll design, build, and evolve gameplay systems that sit at the core of player experience. You’ll work hands-on in C++ within modern game engines, contributing to systems that are robust, scalable, and built for real-world production.
   

  

 Assignments are typically 6–24 months, and as a consultant you’re expected to ramp up quickly and deliver value from day one. You’ll take ownership of gameplay features from concept to implementation, working closely with designers, QA, and production to ensure systems are both technically sound and fun to play.
   

  

**Who you are** 
 We are seeking a
 **Senior Gameplay Programmer** 
 with strong technical depth and a passion for building systems that create meaningful player experiences. You have a proven ability to take ownership, solve complex problems, and contribute to a team at a high level.
   

  

 Here’s what we’re looking for:
   

  

* 5+ years of hands-on experience developing gameplay systems, preferably in multiplayer games (shooters are a strong plus)
* Excellent C++ skills with deep experience in a game engine environment (custom engine or Unreal)
* Strong understanding of CPU architecture, memory, and performance trade-offs
* Ability to explain and apply concepts like CPU caches in real-world code
* Experience building gameplay systems that support emergent interactions
* Broad familiarity across gameplay, physics, animation, AI, and systems integration
* Strong foundation in 3D math (linear algebra, vectors, matrices)
* Experience shipping at least one title in a C++ environment
* Experience with live service development and maintaining systems post-launch
* Fluent in English (spoken and written)


**Nice to have**
* Familiarity with ECS architectures
* Experience building internal tools or improving developer workflows
* Experience shipping on consoles (PS4/PS5, Xbox Series X|S)
* Comfortable working with Git and modern development practices


**This is Coody** 
 We’re one of Sweden’s fastest-growing tech consultancies, expanding in both people and revenue. We attribute our growth to our simple yet powerful approach to Gravity-Free Consulting, combining the freedom and flexibility of freelancing with the security of traditional employment.
   

  

 At Coody, we believe in freedom, trust, and ambition. You’ll feel like a freelancer with the autonomy to choose assignments that excite you, while enjoying the stability and support of a company that invests in your growth.
   

  

 Our network enables you to work with some of the most innovative companies across gaming, tech, and beyond—solving real technical challenges while shaping your own career path.
   

  

 We’re a diverse community of ambitious tech professionals representing multiple nationalities, united by a shared drive to build, learn, and push boundaries.
   

  

 Coody is more of a platform than a traditional consultancy. Everything we do is designed to help you work and live according to your own priorities and ambitions.
   

  

**How to apply** 
 Are you excited to take your career to the next level and meet the criteria? Apply now, and we’ll be in touch shortly.

title: Senior Fullstack developer
description:
We now have a new requirement and are looking for a consultant colleague with the qualifications listed below. The position is part of our consulting business, which means you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments.
   

  

*As part of your application, you may be presented to clients/partners as part of the recruitment process. If selected for the assignment, you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments as part of our consulting business.*
**Your Profile (Must-have Requirements)**
* Full Stack JavaScript (Node.js, TypeScript) in scalable systems
* Data pipelines and orchestration (e.g. Apache Airflow)
* Distributed systems, APIs, cloud infrastructure
* Experience with data flows, tracking, or integrations
* AdTech/MarTech experience is a plus


**Application deadline:** 
 24-03-2026
   

  

**About Us**
 We currently employ experienced consultants in areas such as System Development, AI, Machine Learning, Testing, Cloud, Infra DevOps, and IT Project Management.
   

  

 Working at Deploja is something entirely different from working at an ordinary consulting company—and we are really proud of that. So, what makes us unique?
   

  

 We simply offer more than just a high salary and greater freedom; that’s just the beginning. With us, you’ll find the work environment and opportunities you deserve. Welcome to Deploja, where the grass is indeed greener!
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Exciting assignments with our many clients. We focus on long-term projects, which gives you the opportunity to create value for the client while also developing yourself.
   

  

 🌟 A secure monthly salary – together we’ll agree on a base salary depending on your assignments.
   

  

 🚗 Company car – we encourage you to choose an electric car for a more sustainable future.
   

  

 💼 Occupational pension and great opportunities for salary conversion.
   

  

 🌴 Vacation – Would you like more than 30 days of vacation, perhaps 60 days?
   

  

 🏥 Private health insurance, accident insurance, and life insurance for increased security.
   

  

 📚 Skills development – you set your own budget and choose the training you wish to attend.
   

  

 🕑 Quality of life – Are you struggling to balance everyday life and wish to work a little less while still earning as much, if not more?
   

  

*We handle applications continuously, and due to the high workload, it's especially important to include a short motivation for the position, explaining how you meet the requirements.*

title: Senior Web Developer
description:
**What will you do?**
 As a Senior Web Developer at Rebtel, you will join the team replacing our old legacy system with a new one using Next.js, Typescript, GraphQL, React Testing Library, and Cypress. We’re looking for someone who can help us make the most of these technologies to build a sustainable and scalable platform that we’ll build on top of for years to come, while also maintaining our legacy system.
   

  

 We’re looking for an innovative engineer with a keen intuition for customer experience. Being part of the team at Rebtel means understanding and anticipating customer needs in an environment where your voice is encouraged.
   

  

 We work in an Agile environment to manage tasks and plan product roadmaps, involving regular goal-setting, backlog refinements, retrospectives, and clear communication. This approach enables developers to influence strategy, goals, and planning, everyone on the team is part of both planning and execution.
   

  

**Areas Of Ownership**
* Contribute expertise to elevate the web platform to the next level while actively sharing knowledge and learning from others in the team.
* Drive continuous improvements in user experience and enhance how users interact with the software.
* Contribute to designing and building complex software that is maintainable, secure, and scalable.
* Participate in technical discussions, uphold coding best practices, and strive to find the simplest possible solutions to complex problems.
* Ensure high-quality deliverables by covering edge cases and writing unit and integration tests.
* Collaborate effectively within the team and across functions, while also taking ownership as a sole developer within designated areas.


**Requirements**
* You are an excellent communicator and collaborator. We work in English, but you will hear many languages in our Stockholm office
* 5+ years of full-time professional experience
* Proficiency in JavaScript
* Experience working with TypeScript
* Experience with development lifecycle tools and processes (GitHub, Jira)
* Knowledgeable and experienced in modern JavaScript frameworks or libraries (React, Angular, Vue, etc.)
* Experience integrating REST APIs
* Experienced in writing clear and concise documentation
* Excellent communication skills in English
* Committed to writing structured, clean, and testable code
* Able to raise the level of everyone around you
* Enjoys hacking on new technology and loves R&D
* Always curious, always learning
* Has a vision for product development and how a codebase evolves


**Why Rebtel?**
 When you join Rebtel, you become part of a global team, bringing together diverse minds from every corner of the world. Our headquarter is nestled in Stockholm and here we strike a balance between dedicated work and more relaxed activities. Every Friday the unmistakable aroma of freshly popped popcorn fills the air, but our celebrations encompass everything from minor and major common accomplishments to cinnamon bun day.
   

  

**Benefits**
 At Rebtel, you are the most important asset and we strive to provide a comprehensive package of benefits and perks that enhance your well-being and work experience. Here are some of the things you can expect from us:
   

  

* Pension Plan
* Health Checkups, Influenza shots and Private Medical Insurance
* Dental Insurance
* Occupational insurance
* Wellness allowance (5,000 SEK)
* Discount on gym memberships
* Bonus program
* Extra parental pay
* 30 days annual vacation
* Monday breakfasts
* Relocation Support, if you're joining us from afar, we'll assist you in making a smooth transition.


 Rebtel is an international workplace, and at the office, we speak English; therefore, high English proficiency is required. We are committed to being an LGBTQIA+ safe workplace, a place where individuals can be open about who they are without fear of discrimination or harassment.
   

  

*We are Rebtel. We come from all around the world to create products for anyone who has crossed a border. We believe in equal opportunity and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.*
 Rebtel is a company of about 70 people from 31 countries who share a common mission to empower diaspora communities around the world to stay connected to where they come from. From our office in central Stockholm, we help our user base of 1 million dual-culture people—predominantly from the global south—connect with and support their communities through affordable data-free international calling and mobile top-ups. With our app and online platform, we help dissolve the space between their worlds so they can live more connected lives.

title: Unity Developer (Parental Cover)
description:
Do you want to work with an app loved by kids all around the world? Toca Boca World has millions (and millions) of users with more and more kids discovering the app every day. It’s a live platform for true open-ended play, an ever-expanding space where kids can tell any story they like.
   

  

**What You’ll Be Doing**
 You’ll be part of a cross-functional team focused on creating and improving systems outside the core gameplay loop. By developing and refining meta systems, you’ll help make Toca Boca World more engaging, rewarding, and long-lasting. You’ll work closely with other team members to turn ideas into polished features, improve existing systems, and shape new experiences that strengthen player motivation and satisfaction.
   

  

 This is a parental leave cover starting in May 2026.
   

  

 ,
   

  

**What You Bring**
* Several years of experience working with Unity and C#, with a strong understanding of how to build and ship engaging 2D games.
* Good understanding of UI implementation in Unity and how to build clear, maintainable interfaces for game features and systems.
* Experience working on a live-service game.
* A collaborative mindset and experience working closely with other developers and cross-functional game teams.
* A proactive, self-driven way of working, with the ability to take ownership and move features forward.
* Good judgment when making technical trade-offs, balancing quality, maintainability, and delivery timelines.
* A software engineering mindset, with an appreciation for writing clean, scalable, and well-structured code.
* Curiosity and confidence when working with exploratory tasks and solving new technical challenges.
* You believe in the power of play!


**This is us!**
 Play is in our DNA. At Toca Boca, we make playful, safe spaces where kids can have fun and feel free to be themselves. Over 60 million kids from all over the world play our games every month. Are you in? Let’s play.
   

  

**Good to know!**
 This is a parental cover position starting in May 2026. It is based in our Stockholm office with a hybrid working model (part office, part working from home). You need to be located in Sweden as we are unable to support relocation or offer remote work. As we’re an international company, with over 20 nationalities working here, and millions of users all over the world, you have to be fluent in English. Your application should therefore be in English.

title: Backend Software Developer - Web3
description:
Are you a Backend Software Engineer with a keen interest in everything Web3 and how this can be applied to iGaming? Then this is the role for you! We are looking for a Software Engineer to help us in the beginning of our journey to bring new and innovative iGaming products and brands to the market, leveraging the exciting possibilities provided by Web3 concepts and technologies.
 


**The Wow** 

 As s Backend Developer you will be responsible for the server-side code and APIs of our web applications. You will work closely with our development team to ensure system consistency and to create a great user experience.
 


**A taster of what you will be involved with** 
* Participate in sprint planning, task estimation, development testing, code reviews and deploying software
* Maintenance and improving of existing software
* Designing code, unit tests
* Managing SQL and NoSQL data models


 What we are looking for
 * 5+ years as a backend developer
* 5+ years of developing backend systems, preferably in .NET/C# with knowledge in ASP.NET Web API
* Proficiency in SQL Server or Postgres; both in writing queries and tuning performance
* Experience with blockchain integrations
* Experience in design and implementation of distributed and multi-tier systems, understanding SOA principles and service oriented environments (multiple services, multiple machines)
* Knowledge in automated testing and continuous integration
* Use of agile/lean methodologies for continuous delivery and improvement
* Experience of coaching and mentoring junior colleagues
* Confident in both written and spoken English


 Extra awesome if you have
 * NoSQL databases (Couchbase)
* CRM Systems
* .NET Core
* Knowledge in HTML 5, CSS, JS, jQuery and/or JavaScript frameworks
* Distributed microservice-based architectures
* We don’t expect you to be an expert in all of these technologies but would anticipate experience with some combined with a curiosity for others Docker, Consul, etcD, Kubernetes, Elasticsearch, Apache Kafka, RabbitMQ



  
 


**What we offer** 

 Much like riding a rollercoaster, sometimes life at Betsson can be lightning fast with twists and turns but always FUN! Then again, what else would you expect from a business 75% millennial and 1700 strong, spread across 7 offices with 900 based out of our Malta HQ alone! We recognise it may not be for the faint-hearted, but if you’re a go-getter, initiator and adrenaline junkie, always striving to push the boundaries and challenge yourself, then you’ll fit right in.
 



  
 


 Challenge accepted?
 
***By submitting your application, you understand that your personal data will be processed as set out in our Privacy Policy***

title: .NET Software Engineer
description:
**A Little Bit About Our Team**
 X5 is a Stockholm based leader in the music industry that combines fast moving startup vibes, with the backbone strength and opportunities that come from being part of Warner Music Group. X5 creates and delivers music products to all the major music platforms, using our purpose-built in-house application suite. We are a small and dedicated team, combining both tech prowess and music expertise to connect music listeners with the music they love. We work in a hybrid model and offer a modern office with beautiful views of central Stockholm.
   

  

**Your Role**
 As a Software Engineer at X5, you will be an important part of building our music business application suite. Our applications help us create the best music products possible based on a vast music catalogue while visualizing trends and financial data to all our stakeholders, including labels and artists. You will be work on a small team of dedicated engineers, collaborating closely with the users and stakeholders of our applications. You will dive deep into the business processes and applications supporting them, and take end-to-end ownership to ensure they run smoothly and are continuously improved upon.
   

  

**Here You’ll Get To**
* Take end-to-end ownership and develop some of our most important business applications: keep them stable, resilient, and easy to maintain while driving continuous improvements over time.
* Contribute to technical direction by proposing improvements and helping evolve standards and practices—in collaboration with the team.
* Write and refactor code with maintainability and performance in mind, improve automated testing, and have sound judgment when making design tradeoff decisions. You will also contribute high-quality code reviews.
* Build, ship, and operate your code: improve CI/CD pipelines, strengthen our infrastructure‑as‑code, and ensure smooth deployments.
* Monitor and understand production system behavior, improve observability, and drive performance and scalability improvements by testing, identifying bottlenecks, and implementing optimizations.
* Lead root cause analyses for incidents and implement corrective actions that improve long‑term reliability.
* Learn and grow as a professional through close collaboration with your team members as well as our end users and stakeholders, and by being part of a culture of continuous improvement and learning.


**About You**
* You are a curious and dedicated software engineer with at least 3 years of experience with building complex systems in C#/.NET.
* You have a degree (or equivalent education) in Computer Science, Computer Engineering or other related field.
* You thrive in taking end-to-end ownership for your area and work closely together with the tech team as well as other stakeholders to create world-class products.
* You are passionate about writing clean, maintainable code and understand how it fits into the bigger picture.
* You are comfortable working with the whole stack including relational databases, cloud platforms, CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure as code.
* You are an effective communicator who can bridge technical and non-technical discussions and simplify complex topics.
* You work proactively and involve the right stakeholders before making changes that impact others.


**We’d Love It If You Also Had**
* Experience or interest in Microsoft Business Intelligence Suite including Azure Data Factory, Synapse, and Power BI
* Hands on Azure experience
* Experience using the latest AI tools in your workflow


 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer!
description:

 Our POS platforms serve 
 
 thousands of merchants across the Nordics every day
 
 .
 



 We are now strengthening our POS team with a 
 
 Senior Full-Stack Engineer
 
  who wants to play a key role in shaping a 
 
 next-generation POS ecosystem for the Nordic market

 📍

**Your Focus**

 POS ecosystem

-

 Nice to have:

 Andreas Hammar - andreas.hammar@crona.se

title: Senior Backend Developer
description:
At Viaplay Group, we entertain millions of people every day through our streaming services, radio networks, and TV channels. We believe in the power of content not just as a way of telling stories and touching lives, but also expanding worlds.
   

  

 We’re looking for the best people to join us on our journey. Right now, we’re searching for a
 **Senior Backend Developer** 
 in our
 **Stockholm** 
 office – are you ready to hit play on an exciting career change?
   

  

**The Role**
 You’ll join a platform team at the center of a transformation of our commercial backend. We build and maintain a standardized, flexible, and resilient commerce foundation that reduces technical complexity, helping our product teams move faster and be more creative.
   

  

**In Practice, That Means**
* Simplifying a complex legacy landscape
* Building modern services alongside it
* Creating clear APIs, patterns, and capabilities that other teams can rely on
* Making it easier, not harder, for teams to build and experiment


**What You'll Do**
* Take ownership from problem → solution → production → iteration
* Make pragmatic technical decisions that balance speed, quality, and business impact
* Collaborate closely with multiple teams - this is a highly cross-team role
* Contribute to evolving our platform from legacy to modern, modular solutions
* Leverage AI tools where it adds value, from accelerating development to improving quality and learning faster


**What We’re Looking For**
 We understand you may feel confident ticking certain boxes more than others and that’s why we always keep an open mind in our recruitment process. But, in order to thrive in this role, we do believe you’ll have at least some experience in the following:
   

  

* Strong backend experience (Node.js, Rust, or similar)
* Experience working with cloud platforms (preferably AWS)
* Experience contributing to refactoring or modernization efforts
* Experience working across team boundaries


**It’s a bonus if you have:** 
  

  

* Experience from a platform or enablement team
* Experience in high-traffic/transactional systems
* Experience working in ambiguous or fast-changing environments


**You’ll Thrive Here If You**
* Have a bias for action - you don’t wait for perfect clarity before starting to deliver
* Are pragmatic - you know when something is “good enough” and iterate from there
* Are comfortable working with complex or legacy systems
* Take ownership and drive your work forward independently
* Enjoy collaborating and enabling other teams to succeed
* Are comfortable in a fluid, evolving environment
* Are curious about new tools and ways of working


 What we offer you
   

  

* We’ve got you covered! 30 days of paid vacation every year, an attractive pension and insurance scheme, and generous parental leave pay lift.
* Your wellbeing matters. We provide you with various wellbeing initiatives including wellness allowance.
* Flexibility that works. We follow a hybrid model with at least three days a week in the office, giving you the best mix of collaboration and focus time.
* A safe space to grow and up-skill. Our learning culture puts you in the driver’s seat of your own development.
* An innovative environment with Hack Days once a year. This week-long initiative allows you to think outside the box and deliver creative, technical solutions that (more often than not) go on to be implemented, either in our product or our ways of working.
* Entertainment is what we love, and entertainment is what we do. So, unlimited access to Viaplay seems only fair for you to get to know the product – including serier & viewing events, new release movie rentals, linear channels and more.


**Hit play today**
 If this feels like your kind of challenge, make sure you apply by attaching your CV here – you may also want to add your LinkedIn profile. Please don’t send us your application via email because we won’t be able to accept it. We do, however, welcome any questions you may have about this particular position.
   

  

 Want to learn more about who we are and what we do? Check out our careers page or follow us on Instagram! We’re only ever a few clicks away.

title: Senior Software Engineer (Java) - Remote Work
description:
At BairesDev®, we've been leading the way in technology projects for over 15 years. We deliver cutting-edge solutions to giants like Google and the most innovative startups in Silicon Valley.
 



 Our diverse 4,000+ team, composed of the world's Top 1% of tech talent, works remotely on roles that drive significant impact worldwide.
 



 When you apply for this position, you're taking the first step in a process that goes beyond the ordinary. We aim to align your passions and skills with our vacancies, setting you on a path to exceptional career development and success.
 



  





 Senior Software Engineer (Java) at BairesDev
 



  





 We’re looking for a Senior Software Engineer with a strong Java background and real experience building distributed systems. You understand concurrent programming at a deep level, you’ve worked on data flow or streaming infrastructure, and you know how systems behave when the load is real and the data keeps moving. You’ll be working on a platform used by thousands of organizations worldwide to move and manage critical data — the kind of work where your engineering foundations genuinely matter.
 



  





 What You’ll Do:
 



  





 - Design and develop backend components in Java for a large-scale distributed data flow platform.
 



 - Write concurrent, high-throughput code that performs reliably under production conditions.
 



 - Contribute to the design and improvement of stream processing and data ingestion pipelines.
 



 - Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand requirements and deliver scalable solutions.
 



 - Participate in code reviews and help maintain high standards of engineering quality across the codebase.
 



 - Investigate and resolve performance, reliability, and correctness issues in distributed system components.
 



  





 What We Are Looking For:
 



  





 - 5+ years of experience in IT roles.
 



 - 3+ years of experience with Java as a primary programming language.
 



 - Solid background in distributed systems design and operation.
 



 - Strong understanding of concurrent programming concepts and patterns.
 



 - Experience with data flow, stream processing, or data pipeline infrastructure.
 



 - Open source contribution experience is a plus.
 



 - Advanced proficiency in English.
 



  





 How we do make your work (and your life) easier:
 



  





 - Remote Work.
 



 - Excellent compensation in USD or your local currency if preferred
 



 - Hardware and software setup for you to work from home.
 



 - Flexible hours: create your own schedule.
 



 - Paid parental leaves, vacations, and national holidays.
 



 - Innovative and multicultural work environment: collaborate and learn from the global Top 1% of talent.
 



 - Supportive environment with mentorship, promotions, skill development, and diverse growth opportunities.
 



  





 Join a global team where your unique talents can truly thrive and make a significant impact!
 



  





 Apply now!

title: Senior Pega utvecklare till Arbetsförmedlingen
description:
*Är du en mycket erfaren Pega Senior System Architect (SSA) och har erfarenhet av CDH? Är du samtidigt van att ta ett stort ansvar för teknisk utveckling inom en produkt? Vi söker dig med djup kompetens inom Pega Platform (v8+) för arbete i en modulär och integrationsintensiv arkitektur. Erfarenhet av Pega Constellation och Decision Hub inklusive design av beslutslogik förutsätts.*




*Vill du vara med och utveckla lösningar som varje år gör skillnad för arbetssökande, arbetsförmedlare och samarbetspartners? Hos oss får du arbeta med modern teknik, i en dynamisk arbetsmiljö med kompetenta kollegor i agila team och med en produkt som är central för Sveriges arbetsmarknad. Tillsammans får vi Sverige i arbete! Vill du bli en av oss?*




****Vilka är vi****




 På avdelningen Digital Förmedling inom IT arbetar cirka 450 personer med att designa och utveckla digitala lösningar för framtidens Arbetsförmedling. Vi är mitt i en spännande digital transformation. Som Pega utvecklare kommer du att vara en del av ett team som förvaltar och utvecklar system för interna användare, främst arbetsförmedlare.
   

  

 Sektionen Aktivitet & Stöd består av 15 kollegor, vi utökar nu med ett nytt team som kommer att ansvara för den ena produkten, Kvalificeringsregler och Utbud. Produkten innehåller kontroll och regelfunktioner som används inför beslut av olika insatser och den är central inför beslut av insatser för arbetssökande och för bidrag till arbetsgivare.
   

  





 Produkten byggs på en modulär arkitektur där fokus ligger på skalbarhet, flexibilitet och återanvändbara komponenter. Lösningarna utvecklas och förvaltas med hjälp av tekniker såsom REST API:er, JMS-lyssnare, Queue Processors, Job Schedulers samt moderna gränssnitt baserade på Pega Constellation.
   

  





 Du kommer att ingå i ett agilt team som ansvarar för hela processen från idé till utveckling och uppföljning av digitala lösningar. Vi värderar samarbete och öppenhet. Hos oss får du möjlighet att utveckla din tekniska förmåga och vi uppmuntrar alla medarbetare att gå kurser och ta del av kompetensutveckling. 
   

  





  
   

  





****Vem söker vi****




 Som Pega utvecklare tar du ett stort ansvar för både din egen prestation och teamets leveranser. Du har en god kommunikativ förmåga, samarbetar väl och bygger starka relationer. Du drivs av att ständigt utveckla både dig själv och kvaliteten i dina leveranser.
   

  





 Du har god överblick över mål och plan framåt för det arbete du och ditt team driver, och du kommunicerar på ett enkelt och begripligt sätt vad som är gjort, vad som återstår samt vilka hinder eller risker som finns för att nå målen. Du förväntas analysera, planera, genomföra förvaltning och utveckling i linje med arbetsförmedlingens mål. I arbetet ingår också att kontinuerligt förbättra arbetssätt, strategier, processer, metoder och verktyg.
   

  





 Du har förmåga att förmedla kunskap och information på ett pedagogiskt sätt och bidrar med ett coachande förhållningssätt gentemot mer juniora kollegor.
   

  





  
   

  





****Vårt erbjudande****




 Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning på heltid som kan komma att inledas med sex månaders provanställning. Tillträde enligt överenskommelse. Placeringsort är Arbetsförmedlingens huvudkontor i Solna.
   

  





 Vi erbjuder förmånliga semesteravtal, friskvård på arbetstid samt friskvårdsbidrag. I denna tjänst erbjuder vi möjlighet att arbeta på distans upp till 49 procent på årsbasis.
   

  





 Mer om att jobba hos oss 
   

  





  
   

  





****Grundläggande kvalifikationskrav****



* Systemvetenskaplig utbildning, alternativt motsvarande kunskaper förvärvade på annat sätt och som bedöms som likvärdiga
* Minst 5 års arbetslivserfarenhet som SSA
* Minst 2 års arbetslivserfarenhet inom CDH
* Är PCSSA-certifierad (eller högre)
* Är PCDC-certified
* Tidigare arbetslivserfarenhet av att arbeta enligt Pega best practices, exempelvis med komponentarkitektur för återanvändning och skalbarhet



****Övriga meriter för tjänsten****



* Erfarenhet av IT-utveckling inom en svensk myndighet
* Erfarenhet av utveckling i stora komplexa systemimplementationer av Pega
* Erfarenhet av processmodellering och kravställning
* Kunskap om Pega Constellation
* Certifiering i SAFe eller Scrum



  
   

  





 Den statliga värdegrunden guidar oss i vårt dagliga arbete. Som anställd hos oss förväntas du arbeta rättvist, opartiskt och med hög integritet, samt bidra till att upprätthålla och stärka förtroendet för vår myndighet.
   

 Mer om statliga värdegrunden
   

  





  

 Utöver detta har du personlig förmåga och fallenhet att arbeta i enlighet med Arbetsförmedlingens medarbetarkriterier.
   

  





 Som medarbetare på Arbetsförmedlingen förväntas du vara:
   

**Ansvarstagande** 
 – ta ansvar för ditt arbete, samarbeta och bidra till en god arbetsmiljö.
   

**Handlingskraftig** 
 – ta initiativ, bidra till förbättringar och hantera förändringar.
   

**Resultatfokuserad** 
 – planera, följa upp och bidra till verksamhetsnytta och resultat.
   

  





  
   

  





****Ansökan****




 Låter det här som en tjänst för dig?
 **Välkommen med din ansökan senast 2026-04-07.**




 Bifoga ditt CV där du specificerar årtal, månad och arbetsuppgifter för varje anställning, samt intyg som styrker kraven om utbildning och/eller arbetslivserfarenhet i din ansökan.
   

 Det är viktigt att du besvarar urvalsfrågorna detaljerat och sanningsenligt, för att vi ska få en tydlig bild av din erfarenhet. Om efterfrågad information inte framgår riskerar du bli bortsållad i urvalet. Du behöver inte skicka in ett personligt brev.
   

  





 Har du skyddade personuppgifter kontaktar du den Rekryteringspartner som finns namngiven i annonsen så får du hjälp med att skicka in din ansökan.
   

  





 Intervjuer kan komma att ske löpande. Urvalstest kan förekomma och vi kommer ge dig mer information om processen via e-post efter ansökan.
   

  





 Vi arbetar aktivt för att vara en myndighet fri från diskriminering. Det är viktigt för oss att all kompetens tas tillvara och vi välkomnar alla sökande. Vi ser positivt på om du har kunskaper i något av våra nationella minoritetsspråk.
   

  

  

  

**Välkommen till jobbet som får Sverige i arbete! Här arbetar du på regeringens uppdrag för en arbetsmarknad som hjälper människor framåt. Vi frigör möjligheter så att arbetssökande hittar sysselsättning och arbetsgivare sin nästa medarbetare. För att nå målet behöver vi samarbeta, i myndigheten men också med olika externa aktörer i hela landet. Tillsammans driver vi förändring, utvecklar nya arbetssätt och skapar lösningar som gör att Sverige kan fortsätta framåt.**
  

  

  

 Mer om vår organisation och vårt uppdrag.

title: Senior Software Engineer (Go) - Product Teams
description:
**Tech Innovation at Apotea**
 Apotea is Sweden’s largest online pharmacy, committed to making healthcare products accessible and efficient for everyone. We’re rebuilding our core platform on modern cloud-native architecture — combining deep domain expertise with genuine care for our customers. We’ve been recognized as Sweden’s best e-commerce company multiple times, and we’re now investing heavily in the next generation of our technology stack.
   

  

 In Tech, our vision is to move toward AI-first, automated, and data-driven systems — not by layering AI on top of legacy workflows, but by redesigning how software is built and operated. We focus on building systems that are scalable, observable, and owned by engineers end-to-end.
   

  

 We are now looking for a Senior Full-Stack Software Engineer who wants real ownership, real impact, and real engineering challenges.
   

  

**The Role**
 As a Senior Full-Stack Software Engineer, you will design, build, and operate distributed backend systems and modern frontend applications that power Apotea’s core products and emerging AI-driven experiences.
   

  

 This is not a feature-factory role.
   

  

 You will take ownership across the full software lifecycle: architecture, implementation, deployment, monitoring, and continuous improvement — from database design and backend services in Go to frontend experiences used by internal teams and customers.
   

  

 You’ll work closely with data engineers, ML engineers, product managers, and business stakeholders to turn real problems into reliable production systems — including building agentic AI applications where software agents interact with data, services, and workflows to automate and augment business processes.
   

  

 At Apotea, engineers are expected to understand why they are building something — not just what. You will help shape technical direction, influence architectural decisions, and raise the engineering bar across teams.
   

  

 We believe in balancing fast iteration with long-term quality. You will help define that balance by building systems that scale, evolve, and remain maintainable over time.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
 Full-Stack System Design & Implementation
 *:*
* Design and build backend services in Go for distributed, cloud-native applications with clear ownership boundaries.
* Build frontend applications that connect users to data, workflows, and AI-powered capabilities.
* Build APIs and event-driven components used across e-commerce, logistics, data, and AI platforms.
* Design systems with scalability, resilience, and observability in mind.
* Participate in architectural discussions and contribute to platform evolution.


**Database Design & Data Ownership**
* Design application-level data models and database schemas.
* Make informed trade-offs between different storage approaches.
* Understand query patterns and performance implications.
* Work closely with data engineers to ensure clean integration between operational systems and analytics/ML pipelines.


**Agentic AI Applications**
* Build production-grade agentic AI applications that integrate LLMs with real systems and workflows.
* Design services that enable AI agents to reason, act, and interact safely with business data.
* Collaborate with ML and data engineers to operationalize AI in real products — not demos.
* Help define guardrails, architectures, and patterns for reliable AI-driven systems.


**Engineering Excellence**
* Write clean, maintainable, production-quality code across backend and frontend.
* Participate actively in code reviews and architectural discussions.
* Build automated tests and CI/CD pipelines.
* Take responsibility for production reliability and incident resolution.
* Continuously improve engineering standards, tooling, and practices.
* Contribute to the engineering productivity by constantly evaluating different AI coding workflows and share among engineers.


**We Are Looking For Someone With**
* Strong experience as a Senior Full-Stack Software Engineer building production systems.
* Proven experience with Go (Golang) in backend environments.
* Solid understanding of distributed systems and modern architectures.
* Experience building frontend applications.
* Experience with database design and application data modeling.
* Strong software engineering fundamentals: testing, versioning, CI/CD, documenting, and code quality.
* Ownership mindset — you care about how systems behave in production, not just in PRs.
* Ability to balance speed and quality, making conscious engineering trade-offs.
* Excellent communication skills and collaborative attitude.


**Nice to Have**
* Experience with A/B testing platforms or experimentation frameworks.
* Familiarity with event-driven architectures and streaming systems.
* Experience with AWS and cloud-native architectures.
* Experience building AI-powered or agentic applications.
* Exposure to high-scale e-commerce, logistics, or data-heavy environments.
* Experience working in regulated domains (healthcare, finance, etc.).
* Knowledge of Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, CDK, CloudFormation).
* Familiarity with API/Event-first design and Test Driven Development (TDD).


**Why Join Apotea?**
* A stable, future-focused company with a meaningful mission to improve healthcare accessibility.
* The chance to work on cutting-edge AI, ML, and automation projects that impact millions of customers.
* Opportunity to Work with modern cloud-native technologies (serverless, AI, automation, event-driven).
* Join a flat, agile organization with minimal bureaucracy
* Opportunities for career growth through training, mentorship, and industry conferences.
* Collaborate in a cross-functional, transparent environment
* Own projects from concept to deployment
* Join a culture of experimentation, collaboration, and innovation.


**About Apotea**
 Apotea.se is Sweden’s largest online pharmacy, with the country’s broadest range of over 32,000 non-prescription items and nearly 19,000 prescription drugs for humans and animals. Recognized as Sweden’s most sustainable e-commerce company (Sustainable Brand Index 2021), we simplify everyday life for our customers with fast deliveries and expert advice. In 2024, Apotea reached a turnover of SEK 6.5 billion and currently employs about 1,000 people across Stockholm, Lidingö, and Morgongåva.
   

  

 Apotea is an inclusive employer that values diversity. We welcome all applicants and strive to create a work environment where people, regardless of background, gender, age, religion, or disability, can thrive and grow.
   

  

**Recruitment Process**
* Apply
* Interview: Screening
* Interview: Technical Capabilities
* Interview: Culture Fit
* Background Check: As a pharmacy, we always conduct a background check.
* Offer Presented


**Application**
 Do not hesitate to send in your application already today. For more information or questions, visit our career page or contact us at jobb@apotea.se. We do not accept applications via email.
   

  

 LinkedIn
   

  

 Instagram
   

  

***Join Us and Make a Difference - We hope you want to be a part of our team!***
*Submit your application today—interviews are conducted on an ongoing basis, and the position may be filled immediately. Start date by agreement.*
**Location** 
 : Sveavägen 168, Stockholm, Sweden
 **(On-site)
   

  

 Company** 
 : Apotea AB – Sweden’s leading online pharmacy
   

  

 4 Open Positions
   

  

*Welcome to Apotea – where technology meets health and creates magic!*
 Apotea är Sveriges största nätapotek med fokus på hållbarhet och snabba leveranser. Vår logistik är hjärtat i verksamheten, och vi har som mål att bli Nordens största apotek och Sveriges mest hållbara företag. Tillsammans med våra kunder har vi samlat in över 100 miljoner kronor till välgörenhet, och vi fortsätter att växa varje år – med våra medarbetare som den drivande kraften bakom framgången.

title: SOFTWARE ENGINEER TILL FÖRSVARSBRANSCHEN
description:
**Att jobba som Software Engineer**
 Som mjukvaruingenjör arbetar du tillsammans med dina kollegor i teamet med att designa, utveckla och underhålla vår kund plattformslösningar. Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter är:
   

  

* Designa, utveckla och underhålla plattformslösningar.
* Bidrar till kravhantering och vidareutveckling av produkten.
* Säkerställa kvaliteten och utvecklingen av plattformen


 Du arbetar tvärfunktionellt i ett agilt team, där ni gemensamt tar ansvar för ett specifikt område inom plattformen.
   

  

 Tjänsten är placerad på vår kunds kontor i Solna.
   

  

**Att vara konsult på Nexer Tech Talent**
 För denna roll kommer du att bli anställd av Nexer Tech Talent men arbeta hos vår kund. Efter framgångsrikt genomförande av konsultuppdraget är intentionen att du erbjuds en anställning hos vår kund.
   

  

**Vi söker dig som:**
* Har några års erfarenhet inom plattformsutveckling.
* Har hög- eller civilingenjörsutbildning.


 För att passa i rollen tror vi att du har erfarenhet eller kunskap inom ett eller flera av följande områden:
   

  

* Linux, exempelvis Debian eller Ubuntu
* Programmering i Golang eller Python
* Konfigurationshantering med Ansible
* CI/CD verktyg som Jenkins och Artifactory
* Automatiserade tester
* Arbete med öppen källkod
* Mjukvarukravhantering
* Plattformsdesign
* IT säkerhet


**Ansökan**
